GCCC Canaries

  • Aircraft southbound from Canarias FIR have to establish contact will Nouakchott ACC 10 mn before reaching the UTA.
From To Dest. ICAO Fix/Airway Agreement Conditions Remarks
SECTOR INBOUND
ICAO_CTR ICAO_CTR ICAO - - - -
SECTOR OUTBOUND
